fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Hawaii SLP License Requirements — Fees, Board Contact & How to Apply (2026)
seo.description: Complete guide to Hawaii speech-language pathologist licensing. DCCA application fees, Praxis requirements, and telepractice rules for 2026.
seo.keywords: Hawaii SLP license, speech-language pathologist Hawaii, Hawaii speech therapy license

board.name: Board of Speech Pathology and Audiology
board.parent_dept: Hawaii Department of Commerce and Consumer Affairs (DCCA)

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: The full credential to independently practice speech-language pathology in Hawaii.

license_types.title: Provisional SLP License
license_types.description: Issued to SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Earn a Master's Degree in SLP
steps.description: Complete a master's degree from a CAA-accredited speech-language pathology program.

steps.title: Pass the Praxis Examination
steps.description: Achieve a passing score on the Praxis Examination (test code 5331, score 162).

steps.title: Complete Clinical Fellowship
steps.description: Complete 36 weeks of supervised clinical practice (1,260 hours).

steps.title: Submit Application to DCCA
steps.description: Submit application with fees to DCCA Professional and Vocational Licensing Division.

documents.detail: Score of 162 or higher on test 5331.

telepractice_text: Hawaii permits telepractice for licensed SLPs. Hawaii is not currently a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact. A valid Hawaii SLP license is required to treat clients in the state.
provisional_text: Hawaii issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Hawaii does not participate in the ASLP Interstate Compact. Out-of-state SLPs must apply for full Hawaii licensure.

faqs.question: How much does a Hawaii SLP license cost?
faqs.answer: The total initial cost is approximately $175. Biennial renewal is $120.

faqs.question: Is Hawaii part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
faqs.answer: No. Hawaii has not enacted ASLP-IC legislation as of 2026.

faqs.question: Does Hawaii allow telepractice for SLPs?
faqs.answer: Yes. Hawaii permits telepractice but requires a valid Hawaii SLP license.
